title: A Second Examination
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing1: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing5: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to G+S. Ears react to R+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have G− AND R+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [2, 5]. Alch: ing2→pnP, ing5→pNn.
